snippet.title: Tony Kakkar - Tera Suit | Aly Goni & Jasmin Bhasin | Anshul Garg | Holi Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg Presents Tera Suit by Hit Machine @Tony Kakkar starring Aly Gony & Jasmine Bhasin in the video. 

Singer - Tony Kakkar
Music - Tony Kakkar
Lyrics - Tony Kakkar


Featuring - Tony Kakkar, Aly Goni & Jasmin Bhasin
Producer - Anshul Garg

Video: Gurdas Media Works
Directors: Parth & Gurdas
Video Supervisor: Raghav Sharma
Dop: Shinda Singh
Project Manager: piyush Chandak
Ad: Navdeep & Sunny
Post Production: Gurdas Studios
Editing & Grading: Gobindpuriya
Gaffer: Sukhi & Gaurav
Line Prodution: Aman Film Production
Stylist - Outro by Akshita and Anulika
Art: Karma Arts
Choreographer: Sumit Kumar
Assistant Choreographer: Robin
Tony’s makeup- Rajan Passi
Tony’s Hair - Harry 
Photoshoot: Jashan
Artwork: Vicky Sandhu

Distribution: Believe Digital
Promotions: Underdog Digital

Lyrics 
DUM DUM DUM DIGA DIGA ,DUM DUM DUM DIGA DIGA 
MAUSAM HAI BHEEGA BHEEGA ,MAUSAM BADA RIGHT
TERE SAATH MEIN LUKKA CHIPPI KHELUNGA 
DIN DHAL JAANE DO, AANE DENA NIGHT

TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT ,PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT, BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 
TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT, PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT ,BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 

JADE SUIT MEIN BADE NAGINE BADE NAGINE YAAR HAIN
FAN TERA HARYANA U.P M.P AUR BIHAR HAI
JO BHI GORI BOLE HUMSAB KARNE KO TAIYYAR HAIN
HONTH SE HONTH MILA KE KARTI SEEDHA DIL PE WAAR HAI
TERE SAATH MEIN RANI HOLI KHELUNGA 
MAAROON PICHKARI HOKE LEFT HOKE RIGHT

TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT ,PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT, BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 
TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT, PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT ,BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 

ISHQ SAMANDAR MAJE HAI DETA DOOBI DOOBI REHTI HAI
DOOB DOOB KE SEENE SEENE SATT SATT KE REHTI HAI
YAAR BADA MAJBOOT GHANA PAR TUJHPE POORA LATTUU HAI
TU BHI BILKUL KAM NAYI HAI AISI HAI THODI WAISI HAI 
TONY KAKKAR HOON MAIN RANI LUDO KHELUNGA 
DEKH JALDI MAT KARIYO MAANA TERI U.K DI FLIGHT

TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT ,PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT, BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA 
TERA SUIT BADA TIGHT, PAANCH FOOT KI TERI HEIGHT
USPE KARTI REHTI FIGHT ,BABY PYAAR BHI KAR LENA



#TonyKakkar #AlyGoni #JasminBhasin

snippet.title: Dhee ft. Arivu - Enjoy Enjaami (Prod. Santhosh Narayanan)
snippet.description:
Enjoy Enjaami  - Available now https://music.maajja.com/enjoyenjaami

Artist: Dhee ft. Arivu
Producer: Santhosh Narayanan
Director: Amith Krishnan (Studio MOCA)
Produced by: maajja 

Music video by Dhee and Arivu performing Enjoy Enjaami. (C) 2021 maajja inc.

Follow Dhee: https://www.instagram.com/dhee___
Follow Arivu: https://www.instagram.com/therukural
Follow Santhosh Narayanan: https://www.instagram.com/musicsanthosh
Follow maajja: https://www.instagram.com/joinmaajja
Follow Studio MOCA: https://www.instagram.com/moca.studio

Lyrics:
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thaatha thaatha kala vetti
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Pondhula yaaru meen koththi
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thanniyil odum thavalaikki
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Kambali poochi thangachi 

Allimalar kodi angadhame
Ottara ottara sandhaname
Mullai malar kodi muththaarame
Engooru engooru kuththaalame

Surukku paiyamma
Veththala mattaiyamma
Somandha kaiyamma
Maththalam kottuyamma
Thaaiyamma thaaiyamma
Enna panna maayamma 
Valliamma peraandi
Sangadhiya kellendi
Kannaadiya kaanaamdi 
Indhaarraa peraandi

Annakkili annakkili 
Adi aalamarakkela vannakkili
Nallapadi vaazhacholli 
Indha manna koduthaane
Poorvakudi
Kammaankara kaaniyellaam
Paadith thirinjaane
Aadhikkudi
Naayi nari 
Poonaikundhan
Indha erikkolam kooda sondhammadi 

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Cuckoo cuckoo...
Muttaiya podum kozhikku 
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Oppanai yaaru maiyilukku 
Cuckoo cuckoo
Pachchaiya poosum paasikku
Cuckoo cuckoo
Kuchchiya adukkuna kootukku 

Paadu patta makka 
Varappu mettukkaara
Vervathanni sokkaa 
Minukkum naattukkaara
Aakaatti karuppatti
Oodhaangolu mannuchatti
Aathoram koodukatti
Arambichcha naagareegam
Jhan jhana jhanakku jhana makkale
Uppuku chappu kottu
Muttaikulla saththukottu
Attaikku raththangkottu
Kittipullu vettu vettu

Naan anju maram valarthen...
Azhagana thottam vachchen...
Thottam sezhithaalum en thonda 
nanaiyalaye

En kadale karaye...
Vaname saname...
Nelame kolame...
Edame thadame...

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Paattan poottan kaaththa boomi
aatam pottu kaattum saami 
Raatinandha suththi vandha
Seva koovuchu
Adhu pottu vachcha echamdhaane
Kaada maarichu
Namma naada maarichu 
Indha veeda maarichu

Enna kora enna kora
En seeni karumbukku enna kora 
Enna kora enna kora
En chella peraandikku enna kora

Pandhalulla paavarka...
Pandhalulla paavarka
Vedhakallu vitturukku...
Vedhakallu vitturukku
Appan aathaa vittadhungo
Appan aathaa vittandhungo

Ah.....

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

#Dhee | #Arivu | #EnjoyEnjaami

𝐀 𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐛𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐍𝐚𝐤𝐭𝐢

𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐇𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞: 𝐂𝐒𝐄 𝐄𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬

𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐫ri𝐧𝐠 : 𝐍𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞, 𝐒𝐡𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐡𝐚 𝐏𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐫

𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐝 : 𝐏𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐍𝐚𝐤𝐭𝐢, 𝐑𝐨𝐡𝐢𝐭 𝐉𝐚𝐝𝐡𝐚𝐯

snippet.title: My first VLOG ENJOYED IN KASHMIR
snippet.description:
I had been longing to travel since a long time now, I recently had an opportunity to travel to one of the most beautiful places in our country for work, and I must say it was a wonderful experience, not just because of the place but also because of the people I had the chance to work with, souls as beautiful as the place.

Some of you had suggested me to make a vlog... so here’s a little something that I have complied from my last trip to Kashmir. 
Please have a look and let me know if you like it. Your feedback means a lot ♥️

snippet.title: Highlights - Mumbai City FC 0(6)-0(5) FC Goa - Semi-Final 1 (2nd Leg) | Hero 2020-21
snippet.description:
Mumbai City FC entered their maiden #HeroISLFinal after a dramatic victory on penalties against FC Goa at the GMC Stadium in Bambolim. Both sides came into the contest with a 2-2 aggregate scoreline from the first leg. The Gaurs ensured the Islanders would not register a single shot on target throughout the 120 minutes. But despite their best efforts, Juan Ferrando's side too couldn't find a way past Amrinder Singh in MCFC goal. The game went to penalties and after 18 spot-kicks, Mumbai City FC emerged 6-5 winners on the night.

Watch the highlights of #MCFCFCG and tell us what you think was the game-changing moment!

#HeroISL #LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

To subscribe, click - https://bit.ly/35AzdBp

For all the latest news & updates on Hero ISL, visit - http://bit.ly/HeroISLWeb

snippet.title: Jetha की Life में फिर आया Bhogilal -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3115-4th Mar, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-is-sundar-s-client-1000110161?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3115: Bhogilal Enters Jethalal's Life Once Again
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder plays the call recording of the land deal to everyone present in the Gada household. While hearing this, Jethalal, Taarak, Sodhi and Bhide find out that the voice of the buyer is somewhat familiar. After investigating a little, they find out that it is indeed Bhogilal who has come into Jethalal's life once again, albeit as a buyer. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:

Episode 3117: Bhogilal Reaches Gokuldham
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal has finally arrived at Gokuldham with Jethalal's trap in place. Bhogilal is stalled by Taarak and Sunder at the doorstep of Jethalal's house. Over there, Taarak is introduced to Bhogilal as Champaklal's accountant. All of them make their way to the Gada household where the other society members are awaiting him. What will happen now? Will Jetha's plan move ahead smoothly? Watch the full episode to find out.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story 👉 http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

Director: Rosleen Sandlas

snippet.title: Chanda Jhaanke - Official Video | Hansraj Raghuwanshi | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
'Chanda Jhaanke' is a devotional track but with a new-age sound crafted by Salim Sulaiman and has an infectious World music rhythm. 

The powerful vocals of Hansraj Raghuwanshi & Salim Merchant add a rich tint of folk with multiple Indian instruments enhancing the folk vibe of the song! Shradha Pandit has written the song in a poetic way that makes it more relatable to non-religious listeners as well. The ending of the song talks about different names for Lord Shiva.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Chanda Jhaanke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5X3oePi6rfWKfwwcAbjXQL?si=U3Weemg-Q_WckZkDjcsVag

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/chanda-jhaanke-single/1555674482

T-Series Films presents, A T-Series Films & Amin Hajee Film Company Production; an official teaser of song "Har Funn Maula" from the movie "Koi Jaane Na" by Vishal Dadlani & Zara Khan.
The lyrics of the song are penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya; music by Tanishk Bagchi. 
The movie is written and directed by Amin Hajee; produced by T-Series Films & Amin Hajee Film Company. 
Movie Releasing on 26 March 2021

snippet.title: DIVINE - Satya | Prod. by Karan Kanchan | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/punyapaap

“Satya” is from DIVINE’s sophomore body of work, Punya Paap. Stirring up a 90’s-esque vibe, the track pays a thunderous ode to the city of Mumbai and the bygone era of Bollywood films. Sampling the classic track Goli Maar Bheje Mein from the Ram Gopal Varma directed film, the OG wrecking crew comprising of DIVINE and Karan Kanchan unite to wreak havoc. 

#DIVINE #PunyaPaap #Satya

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3118 - Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZzKESURdZe82ZWGXEwIrl-

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZzKESURdZe82ZWGXEwIrl-

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile

snippet.title: Shabd - A Women's Day Initiative from Truecaller - #ItsNotOK
snippet.description:
It's 2021, but that age-old problem named harassment still remains at large. 

In India alone, 1 woman falls victim to stalking every 55 minutes.

Sadly, this problem isn't addressed, not on prime time nor on any other avenue.

Here is a true story of a woman who’s actions spoke for society.

#SpeakUp and take action at http://tclr.se/2MMBwN4

Take part in the survey at https://tclr.se/3e8fkIF

#ItsNotOK

snippet.description:

Let us explore that in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

snippet.title: 'I was prepared to die': Nun protects protesters in Myanmar's 'Tiananmen moment'
snippet.description:
In what's being described as Myanmar's 'Tiananmen moment', Sky speaks to a nun who stopped soldiers from attacking anti-coup protesters.

Dozens of demonstrators have been killed during a brutal crackdown by the military in Myanmar.

Sky's Southeast Asia correspondent Siobhan Robbins reports.

snippet.title: Simple Ken Podcast | EP 26 - Personal Worth Feat. Rahul Subramanian
snippet.description:
Simple Ken is hosted by Kenny Sebastian, A stand up comedian known for his observational humour and quirky stage presence.

A simple podcast about tackling the weekly conflicts of a comedian. 

A strictly "no advice" podcast.

____________________________

We are back with a new episode and a new guest! Getting Rahul Subramanian on the show was always an eventuality. What better way to record it than in my place. We spoke about our insecurities, our paths to comedy and why we never get around to changing our most stubborn habits.

You can Tweet/Youtube/ Instagram your questions/topics/queries discuss for the next week episode using the hashtag #simpleken.

Simple Ken is available on all major podcasts platforms for free including Apple Podcasts, Google Podcasts, Spotify, Stitcher, Gaana and Soundcloud.

Podcast Website: https://www.simpleken.com/

snippet.title: सीखोगे नहीं तो जीतोगे कैसे 🔥 | MUST WATCH | @Let's LEARN  | Himanshi Singh | Josh Talks Hindi
snippet.description:
जैसे हिमांशी जी हमेशा सीखती रही और आज वो Successful हैं. 

वैसे ही हम सब भी Josh Skills के ज़रिये Spoken English सीखकर सफल हो सकते हैं - https://joshskills.app.link/ZZZR6hjfneb

0:00 Introduction

0:43 Kahani ki shuruat
1:44 Mahabharat Learnings
3:45 Struggle
4:45 Family Decision
5:16 Starting As Youtuber
6:42 Father's Incident
8:43  Motivation For Everyone
9:34 Three Learnings For Us


Himanshi Singh या Himanshi mam(@Let's LEARN ) teaching दुनिया में एक बहुत जाना पहचाना नाम है। हम सब उनकी success से तो परिचित है, पर आज उसके पीछे छिपे उनके struggle और hard work पर भी एक नज़र डालते है। 

तो women’s week के तहत आज हम देखेंगें @Let's LEARN की founder Himanshi Singh  जी की motivational story । Uttar Pradesh  के छोटे से गांव में जन्मी हिमांशी को बचपन से ही teaching का बहुत शौक था। दसवीं के बाद उन्होंने UP board  छोड़ CBSE board में admission  ले लिया जिस कारण उनके जीवन में काफी difficulties और challenges आये , पर उनकी मेहनत और will power के आगे वो कहा ही टिक पाते। स्कूल के बाद उन्होंने दो साल का diploma करा और  फिर CTET का exam clear करा. 
चाहे जितनी कठिन परिस्थितयां आयी उन्होंने strong  बनकर उनका सामना करा और इसलिए आज वो इतनी successful है और लाखो बच्चों के लिए एक inspiration है। आज वे न केवल एक teacher है अपितु कई books की author भी है। 

Himanshi Singh or Himanshi mam is a very well-known name in the teaching world of YouTube. We are all familiar with her success, but today we will also take a look at the struggle and hard work hidden behind this success story.
So, under Women’s Week, Josh Talks has brought for you all the motivational story of @Let's LEARN  founder Himanshi Singh ji. 

Born in a small village of Uttar Pradesh, Himanshi was very fond of teaching since childhood. After her tenth standard, she shifted from UP board and took admission in the CBSE board, due to which many difficulties and challenges came her way, but in front of her hard work and will power, they could not stand. After completing her high school, she did a two-year diploma and then cleared the CTET exam. She gave every test of her life with full courage and honesty. Regardless of the difficult circumstances, she faced them by being strong and that is why she is so successful today and is an inspiration to millions of children. Today she is not only a teacher but is also the author of many books.
She wants to tell the children that, it does not matter where have you come from, the only thing that matters is that how much fire is there in you to get success because every problem and difficulty of life can be overcome by being strong. Also, one should never stop learning.

You can follow Himanshi Mam on various social media handles:

Instagram: himanshisinghofficial 
Twitter: @himanshiiisingh
Let’s LEARN: https://www.youtube.com/c/LetsLEARN2016/featured


#JoshTalksHindi #WomensWeek #HimanshiSingh

Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life. 

जोश Talks मे हम देशभर से प्रेरणादायक कहानियां इकट्टठा करते हैं और आप तक पंहुचाते हैं. ये कहानियां उन लोगों की होती हैं जिन्होनें मुश्किल परिस्थितियों के आगे भी हिम्मत नहीं हारी और अपने जुनून से सफलता की नई मिसाल कायम की. इन कहानियों को सांझा करने का उद्देश्य है कि हम युवा पीढ़ी में जोश और उत्साह भर सकें. जोश Talks हर उस व्यक्ति के लिए हैं जो जीवन में नई दिशा ढूंढ रहें और कुछ अलग करके दिखाना चाहते हैं. तो जुड़िये जोश Talks से और जानिये आपके ही आस-पास जन्मी मोटीवेशनल कहानियां. 

► जोश Talks Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoshTalksHindi​ 
► जोश Talks Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/JoshTalksHindi​ 
► जोश Talks Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/JoshTalksHindi​ 

-----**DISCLAIMER**----- All of the views and work outside the pretext of the video of the speaker, are his/ her own and Josh Talks, by any means, does not support them directly or indirectly and neither is it liable for it. Viewers are requested to use their own discretion while viewing the content and focus on the entirety of the story rather than finding inferences in its parts. Josh Talks by any means, does not further or amplify any specific ideology or propaganda.

She wants to tell the children that, it does not matter where have you come from, the only thing that matters is that how much fire is there in you to get success because every problem and difficulty of life can be overcome by being strong. Also, one should never stop learning.

You can follow Himanshi Mam on various social media handles:

Instagram: himanshisinghofficial 
Twitter: @himanshiiisingh
Let’s LEARN: https://www.youtube.com/c/LetsLEARN2016/featured


#JoshTalksHindi #WomensWeek #HimanshiSingh

Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life. 

जोश Talks मे हम देशभर से प्रेरणादायक कहानियां इकट्टठा करते हैं और आप तक पंहुचाते हैं. ये कहानियां उन लोगों की होती हैं जिन्होनें मुश्किल परिस्थितियों के आगे भी हिम्मत नहीं हारी और अपने जुनून से सफलता की नई मिसाल कायम की. इन कहानियों को सांझा करने का उद्देश्य है कि हम युवा पीढ़ी में जोश और उत्साह भर सकें. जोश Talks हर उस व्यक्ति के लिए हैं जो जीवन में नई दिशा ढूंढ रहें और कुछ अलग करके दिखाना चाहते हैं. तो जुड़िये जोश Talks से और जानिये आपके ही आस-पास जन्मी मोटीवेशनल कहानियां.

snippet.title: Highlights - NorthEast United FC 1-1 ATK Mohun Bagan - Semi-Final 2 (1st Leg) | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
The #HeroISL 2020-21 semi-finals picked up more steam as NorthEast United FC & ATK Mohun Bagan played out an entertaining 1-1 draw at the GMC Stadium in Bambolim. After a slow start, David Williams put the Mariners ahead in the 34th minute. Antonio Lopez Habas' side kept it tight at the back and looked to be heading for the win. But substitute Idrissa Sylla equalised in injury time to keep the Highlanders in the tie!

Enjoy the highlights of #NEUATKMB and tell us your favourite moment in the comments below.

#Letsfootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: LIVE Bhadravdi | લાઈવ-ભદ્રાવડી | શ્રી ચામુંડા માં તથા શ્રી મેલડી માતાજી નો માંડવો | Mataji no Mandvo
snippet.description: આપ અત્યારે નિહાળી રહ્યા છો, કુમકુમ સ્ટુડિયો બોટાદ પ્રસ્તુત -: લાઈવ પ્રસારણ ગામ ભદ્રાવડી થી શ્રી ચામુંડા માતાજી તથા શ્રી મેલડી માતાજી નો નવરંગો માંડવો તા.8-3-2021 સોમવાર -: ડાક ડમરુ ના કલાકાર :- રાવળદેવ સમાજ ના નામી અનામી કલાકારો  :-નિમંત્રક રાવળદેવ શ્રી હરદેવભાઈ બચુભાઈ અબિયાણી તથા રાવળદેવ શ્રી સુખદેવભાઈ બચુભાઈ અબિયાણી    માંડવા નું સ્થળ. મુ.ભદ્રાવડીતા.જી.બોટાદ :: વિડિયો ગ્રાફી :: કુમકુમ સ્ટુડિયો બોટાદ યુ-ટ્યુબ લાઈવ  લાલભાઈ સમાણી (રાવળદેવ) મો.98798 99070
